MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT and Dismiss the Case granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
